svg.title: Sliding window trace over array [4, -1, 2, -7, 3, 4]
svg.desc: Six snapshots of a sliding-window maximum subarray scan, showing pointers L and R with their best-so-far markers maxL and maxR, the current window outlined in red, elements outside the window marked with a red X once excluded, and the values of currSum and maxSum at each step.
svg.text: * The elements in red represent the current window
